calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem David Dawson, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Robert Balian.

Parties present: plaintiff Day Tsuei, Mils Rosenquist attorney for plaintiff, defendant Thomas Kitzmann in pro per.

Case settled according to the following terms, defendant is to vacate the premises at 339 Noe St., San Francisco, CA on or before June 1, 2002. Defendant will pay to plaintiff $1216 for the last months rent. There will be a general release and waiver of all claims, and a release by defendant of any and all claims to funds deposited with the court. If defendant fails to comply with this settlement, plaintiff may move by ex parte application with 24 hours notice for entry of judgment for restitution and possession of the premises, and judgment for $9925.95.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-26-2002 Off Calendar

MOTION To Vacate Default And Default Judgment Of Deft. Thomas Kitzman;
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant Thomas Kitzmann in propria persona 621-6951 moving to vacate default and default judgment
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. of ROSENQUEST & ASSOCIATES 292-0980 for Plaintiff and opposing party
A R G U E D and the Court granted the motion to vacate default and default judgment. This is on the condition that Mr. Kitzmann pay $2794.64 in damages to Plaintiff no later than noon by March 1, 2002. Mr. Kitzmann to file his Answer by noon today.
(JJM/kh) Eric Thorne, CSR 7855

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2001 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Off calendar. Amended Complaint filed on November 30, 2001. (AJR/sl) Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
